text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After class, I spot Eishin Flash and Daiwa Scarlet
in front of the school building. They seem
perturbed.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Nooo... It looks like it's about to rain any second,
Flash.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This is concerning. If we go looking for umbrellas
now, we'll be late by more than five minutes.
choice_data_list: You can use this umbrella if you like.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate your generous offer... but won't you
get soaked by the rain instead?
choice_data_list: I've got a folding umbrella with me too.
I've got a folding umbrella with me too.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Then I suppose I have no reason to refuse. Thank
you for this.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If you're free, would you like to come along and
watch the tryouts with us?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I have an important matter scheduled for
today. Come, let's go to the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh no! It started raining!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Move in closer, Scarlet. Otherwise your shoulder
will get wet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Sharing an umbrella like this feels a little
embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Scarlet, your shoulder is still protruding beyond
the umbrella by three centimeters. Please come
closer to me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: O-okay... Ahaha... Is it hot today or is it just me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them draw close under the umbrella
and begin stepping in unison.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The rain has eased up. Thank goodness it was
only a passing shower.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ah! The race is about to start, Flash!
choice_data_list:
So, what was that important matter you
mentioned?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
One of the younger students that Scarlet and I
have grown close to is competing in today's
tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: She's quite dear to us, so we came to support her.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if she'll be okay... Do you think she's
nervous?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The only thing we can do at this point is cheer her
on. Let's have faith in her.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ah! This is it!
Do your best out there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the race begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even beneath the overcast sky, the atmosphere is
crackling with energy. Sparks fly as the talented
young racers bolt down the turf.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Work those legs! Focus on your lap time! Maintain
your pace!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Stay aware of your surroundings! Come on! Don't
give in! Run with all you've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The racer they're cheering for reaches the front of
the pack early on and maintains a steady pace
throughout.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And in the end...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hooray! She did it! She won!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Fantastic! She was amazing! That race played out
perfectly for her!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Woo! She really pulled it off! This calls for a
celebration!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash and Daiwa Scarlet are so overjoyed
it's as if they won the race themselves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense an irreplaceable bond in the feelings they
share for the young Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Thank you! However, those words would
be better directed at our young victor.
choice_data_list: Looks like you've got yourself a new rival!
Looks like you've got yourself a new rival!
Let's arrange a big celebration for today.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Thank you! However, those words would
be better directed at our young victor.
choice_data_list: Looks like you've got yourself a new rival!
Looks like you've got yourself a new rival!
Let's arrange a big celebration for today.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So it seems. We'll have to stay on our toes once
she has a trainer of her own.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I won't lose! Not to her, or to you, Flash!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I look forward to the day we can all race
together on the track.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you're right. I'll have to cook up all of her
favorite food.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll help out, too! Oh, why don't we bake a cake
together? I'm sure she'd love it!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Let's bake the most delicious treat we
possibly can.
